function.name: readAutonomousTaskArtifact
function.description: Read the full original text artifact stored in a completed ATM autonomous task, such as a poem, essay, note, or long-form writing. Use after searchAutonomousTaskArtifacts for 原文、全文、诗歌、随笔、笔记、念给我听这类请求 when the user wants the actual text.

MaxChars.description: Optional maximum number of characters to return from the artifact text (200-20000). Default 6000.
